name: beauty-diagram
description: Beautify Mermaid and PlantUML in VS Code Markdown Preview — 9 deck-ready themes, dark-mode friendly, no setup.

beautyDiagram.apiKey.description: Optional API key. Anonymous renders are watermarked. Get a key at https://www.beauty-diagram.com/account/api-keys

beautyDiagram.defaultTheme.description: Default theme for blocks without an inline directive.

beautyDiagram.defaultImageWidth.markdownDescription: Workspace default max-width for rendered diagrams. Override per page by adding `bd-width: 800px` to the markdown front-matter (or use **Beauty Diagram: Set image width for this page**). Accepts the four presets below or any CSS length (e.g. `720px`, `75%`, `40em`).

beautyDiagram.replaceMermaid.description: Replace built-in mermaid render in Markdown Preview with Beauty Diagram.

beautyDiagram.handlePlantuml.description: Render plantuml fences via Beauty Diagram. (VS Code has no built-in plantuml renderer.)

commands.title: Beauty Diagram: Embed share URLs into this note
Beauty Diagram: Embed share URLs into this workspace
Beauty Diagram: Clean orphan embeds in workspace
Beauty Diagram: Toggle watermark-free preview for this page
Beauty Diagram: Set image width for this page
Beauty Diagram: Open block in editor (internal)

scripts.preversion: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.version: node scripts/update-changelog.mjs && git add package.json CHANGELOG.md
